name: Marketplace Messaging
description: Dedicated message center for marketplace buyer-seller communication with conversation list and threaded chat views.

page_briefs.messages: Split-panel message center. Left panel lists all conversations sorted by most recent, with avatar, participant name, listing thumbnail, last message preview, and unread badge. Right panel shows the selected conversation thread with message bubbles, timestamps, and a contextual listing card pinned at the top for reference.
page_briefs.thread: Full-width single conversation view for mobile or focused reading. Message bubbles with sender avatars, timestamps, and read receipts scroll vertically. The referenced listing appears as a compact card at the top. Text input with attachment and emoji controls anchors at the bottom.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area

directives: Layout: left rail (20rem on desktop, full-width on mobile) holds the conversation list; right pane holds the active thread. Below md breakpoint, the rail becomes a back-button-on-thread pattern — list view OR thread view, never both side-by-side.

Conversation list rows: host/buyer avatar (32px) + name + listing title (small, muted) + last message preview (1 line, truncated) + timestamp (relative: '2m', '3h', 'Mon'). Unread conversations get a bold name + a small accent dot. Selected conversation has a left accent border + filled background.

Active thread: messages anchor to bottom, scroll up to history. Buyer messages right-aligned, host messages left-aligned, with avatars on the side. Each message bubble shows time on hover (NOT permanently — keeps the thread clean).

Listing context bar at the top of the thread: thumbnail + title + dates (if booking is in progress) + 'View listing' link + 'View booking' link. This anchors what the conversation is ABOUT — without it, threads feel disconnected from the marketplace.

Composer: anchored at the bottom — text input + send button + (optional) attach-image button. Pressing Enter sends; Shift+Enter inserts newline. Empty composer disables the send button rather than allowing empty messages.
Empty state for the inbox: 'No conversations yet — message a host from a listing to start one.' Not 'No messages.'
